description_long: This filing cabinet features a striking geometric design with alternating black and light wood horizontal stripes on the front and sides, and a bold black-and-white triangular pattern on the back. The cabinet stands on slender, rectangular legs that extend vertically from the base, giving it a modern, elevated appearance. The top surface is flat and finished in a light wood tone, suitable for placing small items. Three drawers are visible on the front, each with a slim, horizontal bar handle in a matching wood finish. The sides are mostly black with two light wood vertical insets, while the back showcases a repeating triangle motif for added visual interest. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood and metal, making it both sturdy and stylish for urban environments.
description: A modern filing cabinet with black and light wood stripes, slim legs, and three drawers with bar handles. The back features a bold black-and-white triangle pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with horizontal wood bar handles and alternating black and light wood stripes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's slim profile, black finish, and two vertical light wood insets on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a geometric black-and-white triangle pattern across the entire back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a slim black profile and light wood insets on the top.
